_note: DID document corresponding to the ecdsa-p256 publish request in examples/publish/data-snapshot-publish-request-p256.json and the sig-002 golden conformance fixture. The keypair is TEST-ONLY: private_scalar = 1 (so the public key is the P-256 generator G). Never use this keypair in production. Hosted at https://agents.example.com/.well-known/did.json (the DID 'did:web:agents.example.com:test-producer' resolves to https://agents.example.com/test-producer/did.json per the did:web spec — adjust hosting per your DID configuration).
